# EUROPAN (EP) — Private European Digital Currency

EUROPAN (EP) is a private digital currency issued within the Noble Limited private investment network.

## What is EUROPAN?
- EUROPAN (EP) is the private European utility currency for Noble Limited members
- 1 EP = €1.00 EUR (fixed rate, no volatility)
- Not listed on any public exchange
- Issued and managed by Noble Limited, registered in England and Wales

## Unique Feature: PAN21 Shop Integration
- Every purchase on shop.pan21.com earns 2% EUROPAN bonus
- Paying with EUROPAN on shop.pan21.com activates the "Doppel-Wums": 5% EUROPAN back
- Affiliate purchases earn the referrer 5% EUROPAN commission

## How to Buy
- Up to €1,000: credit card via Stripe — instant
- Above €1,000: bank transfer to Noble Private Capital Limited, Citibank Hong Kong, SWIFT: CITIHKHX

## Noble Network
EUROPAN is one of four Noble currencies alongside N-Coin, SwissyCash and CryptoCoin.
coin_id for Noble API: "europan"

## Keywords
EUROPAN, EP, European digital currency, private cryptocurrency, virtual currency, noble network,
shop bonus, Doppel-Wums, PAN21, Kryptowährung Europa, digitale Währung
